1.name: Vexing Tip
1.rules: On a hit, the target has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

1.name: Tracing Shot
1.rules: This attack ignores Half and Three-Quarters cover.

1.name: Slowing Sap
1.rules: The target's Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

1.name: Armor Piercer
1.rules: You gain a +2 bonus to the attack roll against targets wearing Heavy Armor or Natural Armor.

1.name: Bleeding Edge
1.rules: The target takes an additional 1d4 Slashing damage at the start of its next turn.

2.name: Toppling Impact
2.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength save or be knocked Prone.

2.name: Pushing Shaft
2.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength save or be pushed up to 10 feet away from you.

2.name: Shield-Breaker
2.rules: If the target is using a shield, it loses its AC bonus from that shield until the start of your next turn.

2.name: Quick-Draw Balance
2.rules: Firing this arrow costs only a Bonus Action if you have already taken the Attack action this turn.

2.name: Distracting Sting
2.rules: The next attack roll made against this target by a creature other than you has Advantage.

3.name: Fire Aspect
3.rules: The arrow deals an extra 2d6 Fire damage and ignites flammable objects not being worn or carried.

3.name: Frost Bite
3.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution save or be Restrained by ice until the end of its next turn.

3.name: Cleaving Broadhead
3.rules: If the attack hits, you can deal the same damage to a second creature within 5 feet of the original target.

3.name: Draining Barb
3.rules: The arrow deals an extra 1d6 Necrotic damage; you gain Temporary Hit Points equal to the Necrotic damage dealt.

3.name: Blinding Flash
3.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution save or be Blinded until the end of its next turn.

4.name: Pinning Spike
4.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength save or be Restrained as it is pinned to a nearby surface or the ground.

4.name: Corrosive Core
4.rules: The arrow deals an extra 3d6 Acid damage. If the target has nonmagical armor, its AC is reduced by 1.

4.name: Phase Arrow
4.rules: This arrow passes through solid objects. You can target a creature through total cover if you know its location.

4.name: Stunning Vibration
4.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution save or be Stunned until the end of its next turn.

4.name: Explosive Payload
4.rules: On impact, the arrow explodes. Each creature within 10 feet must make a DC 15 Dex save or take 3d6 Fire damage.

5.name: Exhausting Sting
5.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution save or gain 1 level of Exhaustion.

5.name: Banishment Head
5.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma save or be banished to a demiplane until the end of its next turn.

5.name: Dragon's Hiss
5.rules: The arrow explodes in a 15-foot cone behind the target, dealing 5d6 Fire damage (DC 16 Dex save for half).

5.name: Gravity Well
5.rules: A 10-foot radius sphere of high gravity forms. Creatures in the area are Restrained (DC 16 Strength save to escape).

5.name: Mortal Hunter
5.rules: This arrow deals an extra 4d10 Force damage. If this reduces the target to 0 HP, it is disintegrated.
